short_summary: Iran deal could ease energy costs
rationale: The imminent US-Iran deal is the most relevant new event for Portugal, as lower global energy prices would directly benefit Portuguese households and the tourism-dependent economy.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal scheduled to be signed Sunday
top_events.summary: A concluded Iran deal could lower global oil and gas prices, providing meaningful relief to Portuguese energy bills and supporting the cost-sensitive tourism economy.

top_events.title: Warner Bros $111bn sale to Paramount approved
top_events.summary: A major US media merger has negligible direct impact on Portuguese daily life; minor background noise for media consumers.
